name: Royal palace
hints: The aged King wants something. Perhaps you can find a gift worthy of royalty on your voyage.
The King will drink from a chalice if you give him one. You need to find the gold chalice and fill it with a special liquid first.
GIVE CHALICE to the King after filling it with liquid from one of the sacred fountains. The King drinks it and rewards you.
Fill the gold chalice at a fountain, then GIVE CHALICE here. Different fountain liquids may have different effects on the King.
notes: The Royal Palace where the aged King resides with his guards. Giving the King a gold chalice filled with fountain liquid is part of the endgame. East exit leads to the Persian city. This is linked to the game's objective of saving the King.
